final:
I found notes tagged `job-application` in the vault index. I could extract these company names and statuses from the indexed frontmatter:

- Ausgrid — status not set in the indexed frontmatter for:
  - Senior Data Scientist
  - Senior Software Engineer
- Endeavour Energy — status not set in the main application tracker note
- Energy One Limited — shortlisted
- TransGrid — rejected
- TransGrid — not_pursuing

Notes also exist under Endeavour Energy with `job-application` plus interview-prep/debrief tags, with statuses like `active` or `complete`, but those appear to be supporting notes rather than separate company applications.

About “modified in the last 365 days”: I couldn’t reliably verify file modification times from the repo filesystem because the vault files themselves aren’t present there; I only had the in-memory vault index results. So the list above is what I actually found, without a filesystem mtime filter.
